member.name: P:EVENT.Business.Login.VerifyOtpRequest.NewPassword
member.summary: In case of Change Password With Otp

member.name: P:Tracket.Models.DbConnectionFactory.ConnectionString
member.summary: Resolves the connection string based on ConnectionMode. In Vault mode, parses subdomain from {company}.{product}.localhost and fetches the tenant connection string from Vault API. Falls back to DefaultConnection when no valid subdomain is present.

member.name: M:Tracket.Models.DbConnectionFactory.GetCurrentCompany
member.summary: Extracts the company name from the current request subdomain. Returns null if no valid subdomain pattern.
